title: Workload of employees
excerpt:
Hey guys, 
so far Monday looks really interesting. We’re a design / development agency and we’re having many projects running at the same time. As I’m the project manager I would like to achieve proper resource planing w…

posts.author: schlauchius (Claudius)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey guys,

so far Monday looks really interesting. We’re a design / development agency and we’re having many projects running at the same time. As I’m the project manager I would like to achieve proper resource planing with Monday. I imagine it this way:

  1. Every task in a board has an estimated time we define manually when we assign tasks to employees. Let’s say we have task a) with 2 hours estimated due today.

  2. In a different board we have task b) with 7.5 hours estimated due today.

  3. In the resource planning I can now see that the employee has task a+b with a total of 9.5 hours. As we’re only working 8 hours a day, I know that my employee has too many tasks.

Is there a way to achieve this scenario?

Thanks so much!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @schlauchius

Welcome to monday.com and to our community!

We’re about to release a new widget in the dashboards which should cover most of what you describe. The feature is in beta right now - if you’d like to test it, let us know and we’ll grant it to you?

Thanks
Julia

posts.author: schlauchius (Claudius)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please, can you activate it for my account? Thanks so much. Also a quick explanation how it works would be awesome.

posts.author: Guillaume (Durand)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there! Would love to be in the beta and try it as well. Could you activate it on our The LINKS workspace please?

posts.author: naomiCSM (Naomi SInger)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there @schlauchius! I have just granted this feature to your account. You can use it both as a board view as well as a dashboard widget. We will release the help article once it is out of beta, so thank you for your patience! Let us know if you have any questions in the meantime!

posts.author: naomiCSM (Naomi SInger)
posts.cookedHtml: HI there @Guillaume! Done! Let us know if you have any feedback regarding it!

posts.author: Guillaume (Durand)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! I cannot find it, what name should i look for?

posts.author: naomiCSM (Naomi SInger)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there @Guillaume its called Scope both as a board view and as a widget within the Dashboard.

posts.author: GuillaumeL (GuillaumeL)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @naomiCSM,
We tried the new widget and we’ve got some questions/feedbacks about it:

  • The widget does what we were looking for
  • But, will it be possible in the future to add more than 10 boards? We have to track more than 50 boards each week.
  • Will it be possible to automatically add new boards to the widget? It’s not possible for us to add each board manually and we may forget to add new ones.

Thank you !

posts.author: Paolo (Paolo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Julia-monday.com the new widget capability is very useful but the boards limit for each dashboard is frustrating.
In a scenario like mine where i have a lot of different projects to monitor, the limit of 10 boards per dashboard in our PRO plan doesn’t allow me to get a real picture where my team is spending his time.
Do you suggest any workaround?
Thanks

posts.author: chriswillson (chris willson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Julia,

This sounds like a feature which we’ve been longing for for some time now. Could you please add us to the Beta trial please? https://tgrventures-company.monday.com/

Thank you

Chris

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @chriswillson

If you are in trial, you should still have this in the views centre and in the dashboards as a widget.

If you don’t see it, please let me know!

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Paolo

Thank you for this feedback!

Can you perhaps add in your request as a feature request i.e. to expand the number of boards feeding into your dashboards?

I will mention that on our Enterprise plan, you get up to 25 boards feeding into your dashboards - would you consider the upgrade?

Cheers,
Julia

posts.author: Paolo (Paolo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Julia

thanks for your suggestion but in my opinion, for a PRO Plan, just only 10 boards are not enough for the intent of the workload widget so, as you suggest to me, i will open a feature request.

Thanks anyway for your support.

Best,
Paolo

posts.author: brooks (Brooks Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: I really like this feature, but I’d like to be able to see an indivual’s workload across all boards using #tags. The ability to use Tags as a filter in each widget is essential for us. Is it anywhere in the roadmap? Also, is there a public roadmap anymore?
